insights.summary: Based on your EyeGuardian app data, your current eye health risks include high Eye Strain Index (38.75% of weekly averages) and a blink rate of 1.69 blinks/min, which is far below the healthy range of 15-20 blinks/min. Your posture score of 82.75% in the weekly averages also indicates room for improvement. These factors contribute to your overall eye health status, suggesting a moderate risk of eye strain and dry eyes.
insights.improvements: To prioritize eye health, reduce screen time, improve posture, and maintain a healthy blink rate.
tips: Adjust your screen distance to 50-70 cm for optimal viewing comfort. Your current distance of 43.82 cm may contribute to eye strain.
Practice good posture regularly, aiming for a weekly average posture score of 85% or higher to minimize strain on your eyes and neck.
Take breaks every 20 minutes to look 20 feet away and blink 10 times to stimulate healthy blinking habits.
Monitor your ambient brightness and adjust your workspace lighting to a comfortable range of 100-180, as excessive brightness may lead to eye fatigue.
